headlines.title: Former CIA officer accused of stealing 300 gold bars, sources say
headlines.description: A former CIA senior officer with top secret-level clearance is accused of stealing 300 gold bars that he said he needed for “work-related expenses,” sources say.

headlines.title: Jill Biden says she thought Joe Biden was ‘having a stroke’ during 2024 debate
headlines.description: Former first lady Jill Biden said in an interview clip released Wednesday that she thought her husband, former President Joe Biden, was “having a stroke” during his critical June 2024 debate, which catalyzed the chain of events that eventually led him to drop out of the presidential election.“I don’t know what happened.

headlines.title: Trump says he’s not thinking about politics during Iran nuclear talks
headlines.description: President Trump said he’s not thinking about the midterms as he tries to wrangle a deal to stop Iran from obtaining a nuclear weapon. All as former first lady Jill Biden made new comments about her husband’s disastrous 2024 debate. NBC News’ Gabe Gutierrez reports.

headlines.title: White House vows to keep Ebola out of U.S.
headlines.description: New measures have been put in place to keep Ebola out of the U.S. Airport screenings at major U.S. cities have increased and a new facility is being set-up in Kenya to treat Americans. NBC News’ Stephanie Gosk has the latest.

headlines.title: Jack Schlossberg says Trump ‘impeachment has to be on the table’ for House Democrats
headlines.description: Congressional candidate Jack Schlossberg (D-N.Y.), grandson of President John F. Kennedy, joins Meet the Press NOW to discuss why his bid for office is not "like other campaigns" amid a report highlighting "erratic behavior" from inside his campaign.

headlines.title: Extended Interview: Tom Llamas sits down with Secretary of State Marco Rubio
headlines.description: On the sidelines of the Trump-Xi Summit in Beijing, NBC News' Tom Llamas sits down with Secretary of State Marco Rubio to discuss China policy, the war with Iran, the future of Cuba, and more.

headlines.title: Trump’s May primary scorecard: From the Politics Desk
headlines.description: In today’s edition, we take stock of President Donald Trump’s retribution campaign this month as Ken Paxton and James Talarico look ahead to the general election in Texas.

headlines.title: Proposed bill would tax New Yorkers who tap ‘anti-weaponization’ fund at 100%
headlines.description: A New York lawmaker says state residents who tap the Trump administration’s controversial $1.8 billion “anti-weaponization” fund should be required to pay a 100% state income tax on the money.

headlines.title: James Talarico says he ‘missed the mark’ on ‘cringey’ comments as Texas general election starts
headlines.description: Texas state Rep. James Talarico said Wednesday that previous comments he’s made on sensitive cultural issues “missed the mark,” as Republicans lean on those remarks to attack him in the contentious Senate race.

headlines.title: Trump again disparages Somali immigrants: ‘They’re all crooks’
headlines.description: President Donald Trump went on another tirade against Somali immigrants, declaring at his Cabinet meeting that “they’re all crooks.”

headlines.title: Trump racks up May primary wins in Republican retribution campaign
headlines.description: President Donald Trump went on a winning streak in May primaries as he ousted several Republicans who had dissented from his party line, further tightening his grip on the GOP.

headlines.title: U.S. plans to send Americans exposed to Ebola to facility in Kenya
headlines.description: The Trump administration is preparing a quarantine facility in Kenya for Americans who have been exposed to Ebola amid the escalating outbreak in the Democratic Republic of the Congo, an administration official said Wednesday
